creator: mzs_47@yahoo.co.in
text:
Created attachment 154502
Pidgin settings as images

I configured Pidgin for desktop notifications, however, it does not show desktop notifications. All other applications(textproc/artha, chatzilla) are able to display notifications.

I have attached the pidgin settings as .png files.
